intro: When everything freezes, it only takes one brave move to start again.
description:
When the Giant stops playing, the toys in Villa Cascabel are trapped in a world where time seems frozen, and toys are forbidden to move or even dream about the outside world. Lucas, a toy cowboy, lives under the rule of the tyrannical Sheriff Clockwork Claw.

When rumors of a Big Cleanse threaten to make some toys disappear, Lucas and his companions search for a legendary treasure hidden by Bili the Boots, said to grant toys true freedom.

With a group of unlikely allies, they set out on an adventure through familiar places that have become dangerous landscapes. Their mission is to find three keys and the Eternal Golden Dock, hoping to change the fate of all the toys that were once loved.

An interactive storybook experience. A perfect linear narrative adventure for young readers to enjoy a captivating story at their own pace.
